package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_len: Manual `len` and slice suffix checks instead of `bytes.HasSuffix(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario452Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return len(haystack) >= len(needle) && bytes.Equal(haystack[len(haystack)-len(needle):], needle)
}
